name: Centralia Recreation Complex
description: Centralia Recreation Complex is a place to play pickleball in Centralia, IL. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — For Non-Members their is a $10 monthly fee and purchase of a daily pass, Members Play Free

name: City Hope Church
description: Come play pickleball at City Hope Church in Centralia, IL! There are 5 outdoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: City Of Salem Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at City Of Salem Tennis Courts in Salem, IL! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights and restrooms. The courts are free.
